audience: Mixed computer science and engineering MSc thesis defense committee at Cyprus International University.
content_divergence: Use the locked Spoken Main Slide Plan in pptx.md as the structure. Build one complete 22-slide defense talk. Keep all facts and numbers sourced from the submitted thesis and final artifacts. Rewrite visible slide wording into concise Ahmed-style defense claims. Do not copy internal planning words into audience-facing slides.
page_count: 22 total defense slides. No backup deck, no appendix, no extra slides after Q&A.

body.sample_cjk: The selector closes most of the runtime gap while keeping the main limitation visible.
body.sample_latin: The selector closes most of the runtime gap while keeping the main limitation visible.

image_notes: Use provided thesis figures and methodology assets as the evidence base. No decorative AI images for this deck. Integrate v6/v7/v8/F1/source-aware caveats only where they fit the 22-slide story; do not create any backup appendix.
